title: Trial balance
summary: 9706 — preparing trial balance, errors it reveals, and suspense account.
learningObjectives: Prepare a trial balance from ledger balances.
List errors not revealed by trial balance.
Correct errors using journal entries or suspense.

simpleExplanation.title: Do debits equal credits?
simpleExplanation.summary: A trial balance lists all ledger balances — if totals differ, arithmetic errors exist; some errors still leave it balanced.
steps: Extract balances — DR assets/expenses, CR liabilities/income.
Balanced TB — no single-sided or transposition in both.
Not revealed — omission, commission, compensating errors.

sections.content: **Trial balance** (1.4.2) — know **six errors not revealed** by a balanced TB.
